name: quake-3-arena-engine-luau-roblox
description: A source-available Luau translation of Quake III Arena engine gameplay systems for Roblox.

scripts.build: mkdir -p build && rojo build default.project.json -o build/q3-engine.rbxlx
scripts.check: npm run content:check && npm run format:check && npm run compile:check && npm run build
